name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability, an optimization, or a limitation you want closed
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""

<!--
Please check ROADMAP.md first. Several improvements are already planned, and
your idea may map to one of them. If it does, adding your use case to that
discussion is more useful than a new request.

Please also note the non-goals in ROADMAP.md. Some things are deliberately not
planned (unmarked parallelization, a general JIT for arbitrary bodies, competing
with vectorized kernels), with reasons.
-->

## The problem

<!-- What are you trying to do, and where does Lucen fall short today?
Describe the workload or the pattern, not just the solution you have in mind. -->

## Proposed direction

<!-- What you would like Lucen to do. If it maps to a ROADMAP.md item, link
it. -->

## The correctness constraint

<!-- Lucen has one guarantee it never trades: a parallel run is bit-identical
to plain sequential Python. If your request has implications for that guarantee,
note them. A proposal that would relax the guarantee will not be accepted, so
framing the idea within it helps. -->

## Alternatives you have considered

<!-- Existing clauses, experimental flags, or other tools. -->
